answer:
The correct answer is **\boxed{C}**.

Since the test charge experiences no net force, the electric force \( \mathbf{F}_E = q\mathbf{E} \) must balance the magnetic force \( \mathbf{F}_B = q(\mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B}) \). Solving \( \mathbf{E} = \mathbf{v} \times \mathbf{B} \) yields \( \mathbf{E} = (3\mathbf{i}_x - \mathbf{i}_y - 2\mathbf{i}_z) \) V/m, matching option C.
